full_text:
Yu Quan 于詮
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yu Quan (于詮). Served as commander in Wu during Sun Liang’s reign. Helped support Zhuge Dan. Yu Quan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Yu Quan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
